company.name: Butterfly Devs
company.tagline: Building digital solutions that transform ideas into innovation.
company.description: Butterfly Devs is a student-led software and IoT development team focused on building mobile apps, web platforms, smart automation systems, and AI-powered solutions.
company.mission: To create practical and innovative technology solutions that help communities, students, and businesses.
company.vision: Empowering innovation through software, hardware, and intelligent systems.

projects.name: Smart Water Pump Controller System
projects.description: An automated water pump control system with RTC scheduling, Wi-Fi configuration, and smart relay management.

projects.name: Smart Home Automation
projects.description: A Firebase-based smart home ecosystem for remote appliance control using Flutter and ESP8266.

projects.name: RUCSE HUB
projects.description: A digital platform for Rajshahi University CSE students featuring resources, notices, and collaboration tools.

projects.name: Beautiful Dinajpur
projects.description: A city information and services app designed for Dinajpur residents and visitors.

projects.name: Muslim View
projects.description: An Islamic lifestyle application featuring prayer tools, Islamic content, and daily guidance.

projects.name: Ruqyah Solution
projects.description: A complete Islamic Ruqyah application featuring Ruqyah verses, authentic Duas, audio recitations, self-check guidance, healing resources, and spiritual protection content based on Quran and Sunnah.

contact.availability: Open for collaborations and development projects
